query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "delta: discriminative token credit assignment for reinforcement learni" computer science
rationale: This paper belongs in the literature review because it addresses the core mechanism of "Discriminative Token Credit Assignment" by providing a canonical alternative approach to credit assignment and exploration in Reinforcement Learning (specifically using ensemble errors for value bonuses), which satisfies criteria (a) for same-mechanism evidence and (d) for foundational methodology in the RL domain.
